_publications._publicationTitle: Development of a Novel Biomarker Platform for Profiling Key Protein-Protein Interactions to Predict the Efficacy of BH3-Mimetic Drugs.

_contextSnippet: cell lines with established sensitivities to BH3-mimetics specific for BCL-2 (U2932), BCL-XL (U266B1), and MCL-1 (H929)...treatment with Enitociclib resulted in reductions in both MCL-1 and the MCL-1:BIM complex
details: Established sensitivity to MCL-1 targeting BH3-mimetics and showed reduction in MCL-1:BIM complex with Enitociclib treatment in time- and dose-dependent manner
